case_title: KELVIN ALMEIDA VS. LILY LI YU

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,550.00 FILED BY ALMEIDA, KELVIN AS TO DEFENDANT YU, LILY LI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-19-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER TO CONTINUE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-21-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-21-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. PLAINTIFF KELVIN ALMEIDA IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT LILY LI YU IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER REBECCA CHAU. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-21-2023 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE MATTER TO BE HEARD BY JPT FILED BY ALMEIDA, KELVIN YU, LILY LI
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT YU, LILY LI

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-19-2023 - SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-19-2023 - CONTINUED DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT'S CALENDAR TO JUN-07-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO HEARING HELD ON MAY-19-2023. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN, NOT REPORTED (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $40. SERVED APR-10-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT YU, LILY LI
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. [HEARING - JUNE 7, 2023 AT 3:30PM]

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-07-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUN-21-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF KELVIN ALMEIDA IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT LILY YU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT REQUIRES A CANTONESE INTERPRETER. PLAINTIFF STATES THAT HE SENT IN HIS EXHIBITS SEVEN DAYS AGO, BUT THE CLERK'S OFFICE DID NOT RECEIVE IT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED AT THIS TIME. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALMEIDA, KELVIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YU, LILY LI $1,850.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,965.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
